targets.rawSql: WITH r AS (SELECT run_id FROM forecast_runs WHERE status='completed' ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sku_runs WHERE run_id=(SELECT run_id FROM r) AND p_stockout_3m >= 0.5

WITH r AS (SELECT run_id FROM forecast_runs WHERE status='completed' ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sku_run_recommendation WHERE run_id=(SELECT run_id FROM r) AND order_qty_rounded > 0

WITH r AS (SELECT run_id FROM forecast_runs WHERE status='completed' ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT SUM(order_qty_rounded) AS total FROM sku_run_recommendation WHERE run_id=(SELECT run_id FROM r)
WITH r AS (SELECT run_id FROM forecast_runs WHERE status='completed' ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT AVG(winning_mae) AS avg_mae FROM sku_runs WHERE run_id=(SELECT run_id FROM r)

SELECT fr.completed_at AS time, SUM(rec.order_qty_rounded) AS value FROM sku_run_recommendation rec JOIN forecast_runs fr USING (run_id) WHERE fr.status='completed' AND $__timeFilter(fr.completed_at) GROUP BY fr.completed_at ORDER BY fr.completed_at

panels.title: En yüksek sipariş önerisi olan SKU'lar (son run)

targets.rawSql: WITH r AS (SELECT run_id FROM forecast_runs WHERE status='completed' ORDER BY completed_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT rec.sku, rec.starting_stock, rec.cum_demand_q, rec.order_qty_rounded, sr.winning_mae, sr.p_stockout_3m FROM sku_run_recommendation rec JOIN sku_runs sr USING (run_id, sku) WHERE rec.run_id=(SELECT run_id FROM r) ORDER BY rec.order_qty_rounded DESC LIMIT 20
